comment: Neutral-atom records for the five elements with line data in src/data/elements/. Ground configurations + ionization energies sourced from NIST ASD; ground-term symbols + ionization energies from Sansonetti & Martin (2005) NIST Handbook of Basic Atomic Spectroscopic Data. Atomic masses from CODATA 2022 / IUPAC 2021 standard atomic weights.

primitives.name: helium
primitives.notes: Closed K-shell. Singlet/triplet system separated by spin selection.

primitives.name: neon
primitives.notes: Closed-shell noble. Discharge-driven thicket of red-orange lines.

primitives.name: sodium
primitives.notes: One valence electron — the canonical alkali. D-doublet at 589.0/589.6 nm.

primitives.name: mercury
primitives.notes: Heavy atom — strong relativistic effects, strong spin-orbit mixing enables intercombination lines (253.65 nm).
